title: 初次見到調查夥伴們
body: //畫面亮起，模糊到清晰 //主角做在司徒基地椅子上，龍生做對面(安全帽放在旁邊)。 Lawrence Chang: Jason! You're awake! Thought: ...Lawrence?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看)>> Lawrence Chang: Don't stand up just yet. Take a deep breath.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看微慌) >> Lawrence Chang: Um, I'm sorry for what happened back there...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看微慌返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Where am I? Lawrence Chang: Oh, you're at home.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看抬頭) >> Lawrence Chang: Sort of... Thought: ...Huh?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看抬頭返回) >> ->What's happening? Lawrence Chang: Actually, I could have stopped them before they tasered you.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看低頭) >> Thought: ...Them? Thought: Does he mean those gangsters...?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看低頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: I know you have a million questions, but I'm not very good at explaining things... //通訊官走進來 <<#End>>

title: 第二日主角夢中
body: //慢慢可以奪回控制權(情緒激動比較容易尤其是憤怒或著急)+可以開始利用想法跟玩家對話 //討論司徒寧為什麼偵測不到主角被控制，帶到第一日提到的異常，然後問主角有沒有看到異常。主角說完全沒有。 //Float HelpMCEnding = 0; //第一天跟戴士傑步好路線，給玩家安慰主角和好的機會 //第一天跟戴士傑算好路線 Jason Dai: What the fuck are you doing!? Jason Dai: I told you to keep watch over Fran no matter what! You... Jason Dai: Why didn't you stop her!? //玩家沒有答應保護程芳 <> <<#If($HelpMCEnding=2)>> <> <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You're blaming me?;<> Jason Dai: Who else!? Jason Dai: You failed... ->You know better than anyone that I can't talk her out of it. Jason Dai: You... ->Sorry, I tried. ->I said I couldn't force her! ($DLStateFloat);//玩家沒有答應保護程方才會有這選項0 <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: Alright. I know that... Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: Even if I were in the cockpit, I couldn't have convinced her. Jason Dai: She's like that, always in action, always on the front line, risking herself... Jason Dai: All I wanted was just a normal, quiet life together with her. Why does she keep... Jason Dai: Keep caring more about them, instead of me! Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: ... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Enough with the self-pity show. What now?;<> Jason Dai: ... ->You know she cares about you. Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: I do. But... Jason Dai: ... <<#GoTo(@程芳在乎世界卻不在乎世傑欸啊)>> ->Well, it's part of her nature. Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: And selfish is my nature. <<@程芳在乎世界卻不在乎世傑欸啊>> Jason Dai: I want her to be happy, but she's fighting for the happiness of the whole world. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Why does she do that? Ever thought about it? Jason Dai: All the time. But I really don't get it... <<@讓玩家猜成芳幹嘛這麼大愛>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Maybe she just cares about how others see her. Jason Dai: You mean, she just wants people to see her as a good person? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. We all have a bit of that in us. Jason Dai: I don't think so. ->No. You're suggesting she's a fake. Jason Dai: Isn't that what you meant? <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: If Fran is trying so hard only to convince others that she's a good person... Jason Dai: Then I suppose deep down inside, she's trying to convince herself. ->Maybe she's tortured by guilt. Jason Dai: Guilt? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I think she subconsciously believes she owes the disadvantaged. ->She believes her cozy life is built on top of other people's misery. <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: You reached this judgement over just a couple of days? Jason Dai: Maybe you're right, though... ->Maybe she's obsessed with a sense of responsibility. Jason Dai: What made you think so? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She believes people with the power to help others must go help others. Jason Dai: I'd never think like that... ->Maybe she received help from someone, now trying to pass on the beacon of hope? Jason Dai: If so, she never talked about it. As far as I know, she's always on her own. <<#Simple(10)>> ->The other day, on the roof, she said you helped her. Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: While in fact I didn't do a thing. Jason Dai: She's the one helping me, from the time we first met to this day. ->Okay, just a random guess. Jason Dai: Yeah. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Maybe she isn't aware how much you need her. Jason Dai: That is very likely. Jason Dai: I need her way more than she needs me, more than she needs herself. Jason Dai: She sees herself as an independent woman, independent and not depended on. Jason Dai: On the other hand, I'm so dependent on her. <<#GoTo(@讓玩家猜成芳幹嘛這麼大愛)>> ->Maybe you two don't belong together. Jason Dai: ...I'm not ready for that possibility yet. Jason Dai: At this moment, she is my everything. <<#Simple(8)>> ->It doesn't sound like a healthy relationship, dude. Jason Dai: Maybe, but I'm not planning to change it. Jason Dai: I won't give up, unless Fran gives up first. ->I know how you feel. Jason Dai: Thank you. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@讓玩家猜成芳幹嘛這麼大愛)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@對士傑友善就要跳來這裡)>> <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: Sorry for being mad at you. <<@對士傑友善就要跳來這裡>> Jason Dai: ...Let's go over everything that happened today. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Hey, I'm sorry that you have to go through this. Jason Dai: Yeah. ->Better cut to the chase. Your body could wake up any minute. Jason Dai: I know. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: About Lawrence and those women... Jason Dai: They say they're government agents. Honestly, I have trouble believing that. <<#Simple(8)>> ->You think they're lying? Jason Dai: No. Actually... Jason Dai: Somehow my intuition tells me to trust them. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Aren't you having trouble believing them? Jason Dai: That's what my rationality keeps saying. ->Intuition? Jason Dai: Sort of. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Yeah. We are not mentally prepared. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: What do you think? Can we trust them? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Should be safe enough to trust them, at least for now.;<> Jason Dai: Care to explain? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->They had plenty of chances to harm us, but they chose not to. Jason Dai: It doesn't mean they will continue to choose not to. Maybe they need us for a purpose. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Let's stay alert. It's OK to be used, if the relationship is mutual. Jason Dai: You're right... ->You think they will turn against us once this purpose is served? Jason Dai: A bit hard to imagine, but I wouldn't rule out this possibility. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->The enemy of my enemy is my friend. Jason Dai: A reasonable conclusion. We do have a mutual enemy, which is Vision. ->I have a hunch. Jason Dai: Ha, you're a carefree soul. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Is that supposed to be sarcastic? Jason Dai: No. Sorry if you get me wrong. Jason Dai: I'm just a bit jealous. Being able to accept the reality so easily is a blessing. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I don't trust them. They will definitely backstab us.;<> Jason Dai: How so? <<#Simple(999999)>> ->They have enough evidence to arrest Yan, yet they want to keep this "investigation" going. Jason Dai: You think it's a made-up excuse? But wasn't Fran investigating the same thing? <<#Simple(999999)>> ->She never explicitly said it's the same thing. Jason Dai: You're right. ->OK. But that doesn't change the fact that they could have arrested Yan. Jason Dai: If what they said were true, arresting Yan now will screw up the overall plan. Jason Dai: In that case, I'd agree with them, although I personally do want to punch that motherfucker in the face. Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: But we can't do anything on our own. Let's play their game for the time being. ->You're right. <<#EndSimple>> ->I have a hunch. Jason Dai: Ha, you're a carefree soul. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Is that supposed to be sarcastic? Jason Dai: I didn't mean that. Sorry. Jason Dai: I'm just a bit jealous. Being able to accept the reality so easily is a blessing. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: I, for one, want to trust Nin Situ. <<#Simple(10)>> ->Why? Jason Dai: Hard to say. She looks like a woman with a mission. Earnest, not acting. ->I agree. //前面不信任 <<#If($TrustSuTuTeamOK=false)>> Jason Dai: You mean, you don't trust them, but Situ is an exception? <<#EndIf>> ->I don't trust her. //前面說信任 <<#If($TrustSuTuTeamOK=true)>> Jason Dai: You mean, you trust these people in general, except for Situ? <<#EndIf>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: One more thing worth noting is, she knows about me, or rather, us... Jason Dai: All her talk about genetic engineering and remote control, as if she knows exactly what's happening to us. <<#Simple(10)>> ->But the thing she shot us with didn't work. Jason Dai: Right. I was coming to that. Jason Dai: I don't think her thing is not working, though. <<#GoTo(@司徒打的東東沒效欸啊)>> ->I don't think she really knows that much. Jason Dai: Maybe. They have no idea about who the mastermind is. Jason Dai: Or maybe they already have a good idea about it, only trying to keep the truth from us. Jason Dai: This is a very real possibility. What do you say? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: And the thing she shot us with, why isn't it working? <<@司徒打的東東沒效欸啊>> Jason Dai: For a moment I thought you were gone. Then you were back. Jason Dai: Any idea what happened? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->The specter probably did something to us. <<@去講鬼影話題>> <> Jason Dai: What specter? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You didn't see it? ->A figure, appearing out of thin air. <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: I have no idea what you're talking about. Am I missing something? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I think the specter is who put me into your body in the first place. //第一日一定要講過異常 Jason Dai: The one you talked about yesterday...? Jason Dai: It's still watching us? It wants you to stay in my body? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I think so. Jason Dai: Then this specter is the root of all our problems. ->Honestly, I don't know. Jason Dai: Me, neither. ->But we are not even sure if it exists. Jason Dai: Because I couldn't see it? <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: Whatever case it is, we must find out what it really is, or isn't. Jason Dai: Although we don't have any lead to start with. ->Never mind. Too hard to explain. Jason Dai: ...Okay. ->Maybe it's just me seeing things. Jason Dai: Yeah... <<#EndSimple>> ->I don't know. Maybe her device is broken? Jason Dai: Don't think it's likely... Jason Dai: But again, she wasn't able to tell that I'm possessed until just now... Jason Dai: Maybe her device, or whatever it is, is really broken..? <<#Simple(8)>> ->I guess it has to do with the specter that came out of nowhere. <<#GoTo(@去講鬼影話題)>> ->Let's put this issue aside for now. Jason Dai: You're right. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: Looks like our problem won't see a solution in the foreseeable future... Jason Dai: However, I managed to grab control twice today. Jason Dai: First at the farm, I moved this body to the hospital... Jason Dai: Then a while ago, it was me when we agreed to work with Situ. <<#Simple(8)>> ->How did you do it? Jason Dai: I'm not sure. ->Are you sure it's really you? Jason Dai: Should be. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Should be? ->In other words, you're not sure? Jason Dai: Yeah. I don't know if I'm sure or not. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: It might have to do with surges of emotions. Your control weakens when I'm emotional enough. Jason Dai: Like today, in both cases I was overwhelmed by concerns about Fran. Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: The bottom line is, I don't think it's something I can consciously trigger. Jason Dai: How did you feel when I grabbed control? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->A vision full of noise, then blackout. I could only watch from the back row. ->Nothing particular, just losing control all of a sudden. Jason Dai: Yeah. <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: Have you experienced anything like this before? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. The man I possessed last time also broke my control. ->I'm not sure what you mean by "like this". Jason Dai: Also when he was emotionally overwhelmed? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. ->I'm not sure. Jason Dai: Yeah... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: Even if I manage to take the cockpit, it's only for a short while. Jason Dai: And you remain in my body. It's like... <<#Simple(6)>> ->Switching drivers? Jason Dai: Exactly. <<#GoTo(@類似換駕駛員)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: Well, an awkward situation. <<@類似換駕駛員>> Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: At the moment, I believe we have a better chance by working with Situ. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Better chances of what? Jason Dai: What?? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Get those bad men off you and Fran's tail? Jason Dai: Yeah. ->Getting me out of your body? Jason Dai: No, I mean getting those men off Fran's tail. Jason Dai: To do that, we must get rid of everyone who tries to harm her. <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: Of course, getting you out of this body in the process will be a huge plus. ->I hope so. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: ...Everything's happening so fast. Jason Dai: First you, then Fran, then these people out of nowhere... Jason Dai: I'm totally clueless. Don't know enough to trust or distrust anyone. I'm lost. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Relax. We will figure this out together. Jason Dai: Thank you. ->Stay alert and improvise. Jason Dai: Yeah. ->Man up. Don't be a quitter.;<> Jason Dai: Look at me, being lectured on life outlook by a body thief... ->Give yourself a break. I'm the one doing all the work.;<> Jason Dai: I really want to argue, but... Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: You're right. <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: There aren't a lot of choices. We must work with her for the time being, and improvise. Jason Dai: My objective stays the same, which is to keep Fran away from harm. Jason Dai: Speaking of that, about Eva Yeh... //這裡整段可能會跳過，因為根本沒聽阿姨說或是阿姨不信任玩家 //沒出賣葉宜樺 <<#If($FangHardwareSpySceneEnding=1||$FangHardwareSpySceneEnding=4||$FangHardwareSpySceneEnding=5)>> Jason Dai: You should have sold her out earlier today. Abandon the ship while you can. <<#EndIf>> //有出賣葉宜樺 <<#If($FangHardwareSpySceneEnding=2||$FangHardwareSpySceneEnding=3||$FangHardwareSpySceneEnding=6||$FangHardwareSpySceneEnding=7)>> Jason Dai: I don't know how you feel, but I totally agree when you sold her out. <<#EndIf>> Jason Dai: She dragged us into this shit without asking. We are not obliged to die with her. <<#Simple(12)>> ->Agreed. Jason Dai: Good. We have reached an agreement. ->Actually, she gave me a choice, whether to get involved or not. ($ChoseListenToAYi);//這裡玩家可以選擇不說，或是根本沒讓阿姨跟她說話 Jason Dai: Did she ask Fran when she sent her a ticking bomb? Jason Dai: And think again! Given the situation, could you have chosen not to get involved? Jason Dai: We knew Fran was involved, and we care about Fran. We had to listen to her. Jason Dai: She said it to appease her own conscience! Jason Dai: Pretending to give choices, when she's already done it!;//這整段越講越激動 Jason Dai: ... <<#Simple(8)>> ->I feel you, man. Jason Dai: Obviously Yeh didn't. She had her own plans. ->She tried. Jason Dai: I don't care if she tried or not. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->You're angry because she endangered Fran? Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: Right. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //後來司徒講才知道啊一在幹嘛的 Jason Dai: The old fool tried to pull off something way beyond her, and make others share the consequences... Jason Dai: That's how I see it. Jason Dai: Her good intentions don't matter. The result is the same. Jason Dai: This is incredibly irresponsible, especially from one who brags about her moral standards all the time. Jason Dai: Fran, for example, would never have brought others into it! <<#Simple(8)>> ->Fran brought you into it, no? Jason Dai: I... Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: I'm not the "others". ->Yeh didn't want to. Her plan simply backfired. Jason Dai: Her plan shouldn't have started, if there's a chance of backfiring. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: Oh, and about the job position... Jason Dai: I don't know if I want to work at Silencio anymore. Just lay low until this blows over. Jason Dai: Cooperate with them. Don't cause any extra trouble. Could you do that? //TopFloorStiuationPath頂樓情境，1=跟阿偉去、2=跟俊恩去、3=跟阿偉去，但有說答應俊恩、 4=跟阿偉去，但沒說答應俊恩 <<#If($TopFloorStiuationPath=2)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What about the thing that Justin said?;//擇一出現 Jason Dai: The talk on the roof? Jason Dai: I agree with him. Screening as a whole seems shady. Jason Dai: But shutting down a whole flop farm? I don't see how this relates to us. <<#GoTo(@跳過阿緯上頂樓的話的回話)>> ->I take it as you don't want me to take sides? <<#GoTo(@我可以理解成我不該參與任何立場嗎？)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What about the thing that Wayne said?;//擇一出現 Jason Dai: The talk on the roof? Jason Dai: I agree with him. Ops as a whole seems shady. Jason Dai: But shutting down a whole flop farm? I don't see how this relates to us. ->I take it as you don't want me to take sides? <<@我可以理解成我不該參與任何立場嗎？>> Jason Dai: Between Screening and Ops? Jason Dai: Yes. Stay the hell away from them. Jason Dai: Shutting down a whole flop farm? I don't see how this relates to us. //吳俊恩 <<#If($TopFloorStiuationPath=2)>> Jason Dai: What Justin said did make sense... <<#GoTo(@跳過阿緯上頂樓的話的回話)>> <<#EndIf>> //鄭緯 Jason Dai: What Wayne said did make sense... <<#EndSimple>> <<@跳過阿緯上頂樓的話的回話>> Jason Dai: But it's none of our business. Jason Dai: You should stay away from their problems. Don't make things even more complicated. <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What if they force me? Jason Dai: Dodge the bullet somehow. If you really can't, just pick one. Jason Dai: Whichever side you decide to join, don't get too involved. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Which side do you prefer?;<> Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: Justin. The Ops perspective is more rational. Jason Dai: Wayne is a good man, but an idealistic fool nonetheless. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I see. Jason Dai: Good. ->But I agree with Wayne more. ->But I agree with Justin more. Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: I was afraid this might happen... Jason Dai: You're being brainwashed. Remember, none of this is your business. Jason Dai: There's no reason to throw yourself into it, is there? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->But this concerns the fate of many people. We just stand aside and watch? Jason Dai: Right. Not our problem. <<#Simple(6)>> ->What if Fran is one of them? Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: Fran is not one of them. That much we are sure of. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->OK. I see. Jason Dai: Good. ->You're one heartless bastard. ->I see. But isn't that a bit too selfish? Jason Dai: As long as it earns me a quiet life. Jason Dai: You don't fuck with the world, and world leaves you alone. Jason Dai: I've been living by this motto. So far, so good. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Did the world leave Fran alone? Jason Dai: Shut the hell up! Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: Sorry. Jason Dai: I wanted to respect her choices as much as I can. Jason Dai: What happened to her proves my point. Jason Dai: She insisted on challenging the invincible, and endangered herself, as well as those around her. Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: But again, she proves her own point... Jason Dai: That sometimes if we do nothing, the world will swallow us whole. Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: Frankly, I don't know what to believe anymore... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Didn't you say he made sense? ($DLStateFloat) Jason Dai: Things that make sense are not necessarily right. Jason Dai: If what he said were true, it's none of my business. ->Alright, alright! <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: Hey. Jason Dai: About the thing that happened at Ops... //有拉拉桿 <<#If($DoPullEmergencyBar=true)>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You think I shouldn't have pulled the lever? Jason Dai: No, I... ->What thing? Jason Dai: The racking accident. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: Thank you for making this tough decision. I don't know what I would have done... Jason Dai: You saved his life. And better still, we don't owe the company any money. Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: I guess I wouldn't have the guts to pull it. Jason Dai: Thank you again. Or else I'll be forever guilty for his death. Jason Dai: Thank you. <<#EndIf>> //沒拉拉桿 <<#If($DoPullEmergencyBar=false)>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You do think I should pull the lever? Jason Dai: No, I... ->What thing? Jason Dai: The racking accident. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: Thank you for making this tough decision. I don't know what I would have done... Jason Dai: No one could have predicted the outcome. You had to make a quick decision... Jason Dai: Thank you for sparing me of this dilemma. Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: I guess I wouldn't have the guts to pull it, either. <<#EndIf>> Jason Dai: Huh...?;//場景模糊之類的 Jason Dai: The body is waking up. <<#Simple(8)>> ->So soon? Jason Dai: I don't have any control over it, man. ->Are you sure? Jason Dai: Positive. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jason Dai: ... Jason Dai: Please. Jason Dai: Take care of everything... <<#End>>

title: 主角發現打開門是電梯間
body:
//司徒看著手上的裝置，正在害入主角家的門
<< Play (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站螢幕) >>
Thought: This is my neighbor's apartment...!?
Nin Situ: After what happened tonight, we decided to move the base, in order to keep you under protection.
Nin Situ: Your next-door neighbor happens to have moved out. So we took over.
<< PlayUntil (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站螢幕返回) >>
//門發出音效並打開，司徒走進主角家
<<Set($DLState,司徒開門進主角家)>>
Thought: ...What!?
Thought: How did she get into my apartment?
<<#End>>

title: 回家司徒說主角被改造過
body:
//主角也走進家裡看到司徒站在客廳左右張望。
<< Play (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站看外) >>
Nin Situ: I like it here. Home, sweet home.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Thank you.
    Nin Situ: I mean it. I'd like to have a home like this one day.
    Nin Situ: ...
    Nin Situ: Sorry, I was distracted.
    Thought: Her apologetic smile seems genuine.
    Nin Situ: Back to business.
->How did you get into my apartment?
    Nin Situ: 23 took care of the lock.
    Thought: ...What kind of answer is that?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Nin Situ: Ms. Cheng is in the bedroom, resting.;<< Play (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站看外返回) >>
Nin Situ: Don't worry about her. She's recovering well.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Let me see her.
    Nin Situ: Not yet. I have something utterly important to tell you.
->Didn't you want to have a talk?
    Nin Situ: Right.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>


Nin Situ: I'll make this short, Mr. Dai.;<< Play (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站插腰) >>
Nin Situ: You are no ordinary human.
Nin Situ: According to the readings of these sensors...
Nin Situ: You're genetically engineered, special at birth.
Thought: ...Huh?
Nin Situ: You must have noticed how you are stronger and faster than others.;<< Play (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站插腰抬手) >>
Nin Situ: These are the benefits of said engineering.
Nin Situ: But the process also leaves a backdoor, so that you can be remote controlled.;<< Play (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站插腰抬手返回) >>
Thought: Genetic engineering? Remote control? What nonsense is this?;<< Play (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站插腰返回) >>
<<#Simple(10)>>
->What have you been smoking?
    Nin Situ: I know it's hard to believe, but you are not a lone case.
->Any idea who engineered me?
    Thought: She's staring at me in a funny way. Why?
    Nin Situ: ...
    Nin Situ: You're not very surprised by the knowledge of it?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>

title: 23登場對話
body: 23: Hey, you're awake.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看轉右) >> 23: Sorry we couldn't help you sooner. Me and Lawrence, we just follow orders. << Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐右看返回) >> 23: Hi, I'm 23.;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_側站插腰) >> //有個人設是每次都會藉機說自己較23的原因但都是瞎掰的，司徒知道真正的原因。「因為我23歲啊」「那是我第一場任務的急殺數」 Thought: 23? Is that her name? <<#Simple(6)>> ->Hi. <<#GoTo(@跳過主角跟二十三第一次見面不回應)>> ->Who are you people? ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23: ... 23: Okay, I wouldn't greet the suspicious woman either, if I were you. <<@跳過主角跟二十三第一次見面不回應>> Lawrence Chang: Ahem! 23... 23: What? I don't do explaining. 23: Let's wait for the boss, then.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐摸頭返回) >>;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_側站插腰看內返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->The boss? Who? 23: Not me.;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_側站插腰抬手) >> Lawrence Chang: Um, not me, either.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看) >> Thought: What the hell...?;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_側站插腰抬手返回) >> 23: It's about time...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看返回) >> ->You guys are the mafia? 23: Mafia?;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_側站插腰抬頭) >> 23: Ha!;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_側站插腰抬頭返回) >> 23: He is. Mafia, yakuza, gangster. Not me.;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_側站插腰看內) >> Lawrence Chang: Was! I was young and foolish, alright?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看) >> 23: Aren't you still young? Lawrence Chang: 26;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看返回) >> 23: Damn, I'm old.;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_側站插腰看內返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> //司徒寧回來，很帥氣的退下面罩拔下裝置之類的。 <> Nin Situ: I'm back.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐右看) >>;<< PlayUntil (23, MBU_二十三_側站插腰返回) >>;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_側站看外) >> Nin Situ: They are disposed of. title: 程芳投影開始
body: //投影出現幾個模糊的人影，大家似乎在一個有著大長桌的會議室裡，桌子主位坐著嚴勝和，它身後還有一個保鑣。同時攝影機移動 Thought: That's Fran. And the CEO, whom I met once in the lobby...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_黑影_側站低頭待機) >> Frances Cheng: Enough excuses. Your reaction says I'm right. Frances Cheng: I can't believe it. You...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_黑影_側站低頭返回) >> Shane Yan: All you have is an unproven theory. Shane Yan: Give us a bit of time. Soon you will understand— Frances Cheng: Enough! Don't try to brainwash me!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_黑影_激動) >> Shane Yan: ... Frances Cheng: Let me explain to you the situation. Frances Cheng: These documents could not prove that you're endangering half a million people by increasing generation power...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_黑影_激動一) >> Frances Cheng: However, it will attract attention. You can't kill the rumors. Frances Cheng: Your competitors won't waste this opportunity. Growell, Sunrise, even Tendril. What will they do? Shane Yan: You bi— Frances Cheng: Lower the generation power to within safety range! Now!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_黑影_激動二) >> Frances Cheng: Use whatever excuse to explain it. You have plenty. Frances Cheng: I don't care if you walk away unscathed! Frances Cheng: Keep the contributors safe! Now! Find out who's injured and give compensation. Frances Cheng: Or else these documents go to Sunrise, Tendril, and the press. Frances Cheng: Undo the damage you have done, or else... Shane Yan: You, you.;<< Play (嚴勝和, MBU_嚴勝和_黑影_側坐低頭) >> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: ...What?;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_黑影_激動三) >> Shane Yan: All this talk about "you". Shane Yan: As if you are not one of us. Frances Cheng: Just because I work for you doesn't mean I— Shane Yan: I'm disappointed, Frances.;<< Play (嚴勝和, MBU_嚴勝和_黑影_側坐低頭返回) >> Shane Yan: You're trying to stop something you always wanted to do. Frances Cheng: ...What do you mean? Shane Yan: I have been telling you over and over again, Frances.;<< Play (嚴勝和, MBU_嚴勝和_黑影_側坐抬手) >> Shane Yan: You misunderstood us. Shane Yan: We did keep secrets, but the truth is not what you think, not at all.;<< Play (嚴勝和, MBU_嚴勝和_黑影_側坐抬手返回) >> Frances Cheng: You expect me to believe that, without any evidence?;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_黑影_激動三) >> Shane Yan: Yes. Frances Cheng: Do you know how ridiculous you are? Shane Yan: I know. Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: No more talk. I quit.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_黑影_激動四) >> Frances Cheng: And I'm sending these documents out, to stop you. Shane Yan: I see... Shane Yan: It's a shame. Frances Cheng: Yes, a shame.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_黑影_側站低頭返回) >> Frances Cheng: Bye. //程芳轉身走幾步 <<#End>>

title: 消夜23走後
body:
Lawrence Chang: It's getting late. Ready to call it a day?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->There's something I want to talk to you about.
    Lawrence Chang: Sure. What is it?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒夾一口) >>
    <<@問隆生問題時間第一次消夜>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->You used to be a gangster? ($AskRonMafiaBefore);//問過消失
        <<Set($AskRonMafiaBefore,-1)>>;<<Set($CountAskRonHowMuchQuestion,$CountAskRonHowMuchQuestion+2)>>
        Lawrence Chang: Yeah.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看低頭) >>
        Lawrence Chang: Do you mind?
        Thought: He's kinda nervous...
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Gang, yakuza, mafia, I think they are the cancer of this society.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒吃一口) >>
            Lawrence Chang: I-is that so...?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看低頭返回) >>
            Lawrence Chang: I'm sorry.
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            ->Nothing to be sorry for. You're not part of them anymore.
                Lawrence Chang: Thank you.
            ->Sorry doesn't change a thing. Can it undo all the damage you've done?
                Lawrence Chang: No.
                Lawrence Chang: ...
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
        ->Honestly, I don't feel anything in particular.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒吃一口) >>
        ->They are a form of necessary evil to keep this world running.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒吃一口) >>
            Lawrence Chang: I-is that so...?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看低頭返回) >>
            Thought: He seems relieved.
            Lawrence Chang: I know there are people who seriously mind.
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Lawrence Chang: And I know it's bad. I was just young and naïve back then...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒夾一口) >>
        <<#Simple(10)>>
        ->You're still young.
        ->Don't find excuses.
            Lawrence Chang: You're right, haha...
        ->I know. It just happens.
            Lawrence Chang: I'm so relieved hearing you say that.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Lawrence Chang: My hometown is in one of the evacuation zones. Not the nicest place to live in...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看返回) >>
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->Evacuation zones?;//改成台語？
            Lawrence Chang: Eh? Don't you call it that, where you came from?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看) >>
            Lawrence Chang: Evacuation zones are lowlands that will be submerged when the sea level rises.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒夾兩口) >>
            Lawrence Chang: Many places are elevated like Wanpei, but they have given up on some.
            Lawrence Chang: The residents are generally the poor or the bad kind.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看返回) >>
            Lawrence Chang: I was born there. Things were not that bad until I was in elementary school.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒吃一口) >>
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Lawrence Chang: I'm an orphan. No parents to tell me about right and wrong. So I joined a gang.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒吃飯) >>
        Lawrence Chang: It's all water under the bridge. Now I just want to be a good citizen!;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒夾兩口) >>
        <<#Simple(10)>>
        ->Is it so easy to quit?
            Lawrence Chang: Pretty easy. I didn't owe anybody anything, after all.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看抬頭) >>
            Lawrence Chang: A few boys didn't want me to leave, but I insisted.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒吃一口) >>
            Lawrence Chang: No hard feelings, though. We are still buddies.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看抬頭返回) >>
            <<#GoTo(@龍生小子說會跟黑幫朋友聯絡啦)>>
        ->Do you keep in touch with the gang?
            Lawrence Chang: ... 
            Lawrence Chang: Not the gang, just my aniki and a few good buddies.
            Lawrence Chang: Just occasional talk on the phone, though, and we don't talk about gangster stuff.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒吃一口) >>
            <<@龍生小子說會跟黑幫朋友聯絡啦>>
            Lawrence Chang: Don't tell Nin. I guess she wouldn't approve.
            Lawrence Chang: Please?
            <<#Simple(99999)>>
            ->No problem. You can trust me.
                Lawrence Chang: Thank you, man.
            ->I won't lie to her if she asks.
                Lawrence Chang: Okay...
            ->Why wouldn't she approve?
                Lawrence Chang: I don't know, just a feeling.
                Lawrence Chang: So, please?
                <<#Simple(99999)>>
                ->No problem. You can trust me.
                    Lawrence Chang: Thank you, man.
                ->I won't lie to her if she asks.
                    Lawrence Chang: Okay...
                <<#EndSimple>>
            <<#EndSimple>>
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Lawrence Chang: There's nothing much to say about my gangster days...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看低頭) >>
        Lawrence Chang: Anything else you want to know?
        << PlayUntil (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看低頭返回) >>
        <<#GoTo(@問隆生問題時間第一次消夜)>>
    ->Can I really trust them? ($AskRonCanITrustOwls);//問過消失
        <<Set($AskRonCanITrustOwls,-1)>>;<<Set($CountAskRonHowMuchQuestion,$CountAskRonHowMuchQuestion+2)>>
        Lawrence Chang: Absolutely.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看點頭) >>
        Lawrence Chang: 23 might sound shady, but they are both good people.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看返回) >>
        Lawrence Chang: I have worked with them on a few missions.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒吃兩口) >>
        Lawrence Chang: Although I guess you don't have a reason to trust them, or me...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看) >>
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->Can I trust you?
            Lawrence Chang: Of course! Try me!
            Thought: I still have doubt, but...
            Thought: He does sound earnest enough.
        ->I'll be the judge of that.
            Lawrence Chang: Yes, you're right.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Lawrence Chang: Lemme think...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒夾一口) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看返回) >>
        Lawrence Chang: I got to know Nin first. 23 came much, much later.
        Lawrence Chang: In the beginning she was only a faceless voice, doing intel and dispatching behind the scenes.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看) >>
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->How did you get to know Nin Situ?
            <<Set($AskRonWhyKnowNin,0)>>
            Lawrence Chang: Ah, long story!;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看抬頭) >>
            Lawrence Chang: It was during a mission of hers.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒夾一口) >>
            Lawrence Chang: Unlike you, though, I was actively looking for her.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看抬頭返回) >>
            Lawrence Chang: I was saved by a member of OWL when I was a kid. Been trying to locate them ever since.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_熱炒吃一口) >>
            Lawrence Chang: My goal right now is to become an OWL agent. This mission is sort of my trial.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Lawrence Chang: I believe this mission will go smoothly. Nin and 23 are extremely experienced agents.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看返回) >>
        Thought: Extremely experienced? Neither of them looks over 40 years old.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒吃飯) >>
        Lawrence Chang: Especially Nin. She's...
        Lawrence Chang: ...
        Thought: She's what?
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->What's up?
            Lawrence Chang: No, never mind.
        ->She's capable?
            Lawrence Chang: Yeee-yes! Right!
            Lawrence Chang: I was about to say that, haha...
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Lawrence Chang: I guarantee you can trust them!;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看) >>
        Lawrence Chang: Anything else?
        <<#GoTo(@問隆生問題時間第一次消夜)>>
    ->That's about it. Bed time. ($CountAskRonHowMuchQuestion);//問過一題才能出現
        <<#GoTo(@第一次消夜回家睡覺)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->That's about it. Bed time.
    <<@第一次消夜回家睡覺>>
    Lawrence Chang: Yeah, it's been a long day.
    Lawrence Chang: ...
    Lawrence Chang: Good night.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Good night.
    ->Aren't you going?
        Lawrence Chang: Later. Need to take care of a few things.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->Good night.
            //
        ->What things?
            Lawrence Chang: It's...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看低頭) >>
            Lawrence Chang: Personal things.;//他想偷偷聯絡阿姨，因為他來不及跟阿姨說掰掰。如果是阿姨不信任玩家路線，他就是去連絡阿姨的家人。
            Thought: He doesn't want to tell.
            Lawrence Chang: Good night.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看低頭返回) >>
            <<#Simple(6)>>
            ->Good night.
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    << PlayUntil (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_熱炒右看返回) >>
    <<#End>>
<<#EndSimple>>

title: 打完子彈後說明
body:
//if瞄準後開槍路線
<<#If($DLState=司徒對主角瞄準後開槍)>>
    Nin Situ: How are you feeling? Sorry for the attack.
    Nin Situ: You might be joking, but I can't afford the risk. Had to give you a severance shot.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->How did you tell I was joking?
        Nin Situ: I have a detector that could tell if you're possessed. So far, your reading is negative.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->What if it's broken?
            Nin Situ: Doesn't matter. I keep multiple backups with me.
        ->I see.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Nin Situ: Sorry for jumping you.
    ->The fuck!? That hurts!
        Nin Situ: It's necessary precaution.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Nin Situ: Even if you're not possessed, I've got to make sure you remain so throughout the mission.
    Nin Situ: And, don't joke about it anymore.
    Nin Situ: If you're possessed, I will have to execute extermination procedure.
    Thought: She means it.
<<#EndIf>>

//if瞄準直接開槍路線
<<#If($DLState=司徒對主角開槍)>>
    Nin Situ: How are you feeling?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I'm alright.
        Nin Situ: Good.
    ->What. The. Fuck!?
    ->You could have warned me!
        Nin Situ: If I warned you, you'd have dodged. The last thing I wanted to do was accidentally shoot you in the face.
        Nin Situ: Considering everything, a sucker punch was the only option.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->OK. I would have done the same.
            Nin Situ: Thank you for understanding.
        ->It still hurts.
            Nin Situ: My apologies.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>
<<@子彈打完以後說明組織>>
Nin Situ: The slug I shot you with will sever possession, if any. The downside is that you will be paralyzed for a while.
Nin Situ: Speaking of that, you're recovering exceptionally fast...
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Isn't that a good thing?
    Nin Situ: Of course it is.
    Nin Situ: I'm just surprised.
->I'm strong.
    Thought: I'm not sure what her grin means.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Nin Situ: How are you feeling? Uncomfortable?
Thought: I feel totally fine.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Nope.
->Should I?
    Nin Situ: Most people would feel dizzy for a long time.
    Nin Situ: Somehow, you don't have any of the side effects. Good.
<<#EndSimple>>
Nin Situ: Can you stand up?
Thought: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_倒地清醒轉側站) >>
Nin Situ: Good.;<< Play (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_蹲下轉側站) >>
Nin Situ: That's it for precaution. Take a rest.
Nin Situ: We will plan for next steps tomorrow. Will let you know when we're ready.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Wait! You didn't tell me why I was engineered!
    Nin Situ: I didn't tell, because it's classified information.
    Nin Situ: ...
    Nin Situ: But I suppose you're entitled to know some of it.
    Nin Situ: First of all, OWL has nothing to do with your condition.;<< Play (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站抬手) >>
    Nin Situ: We discovered a secret society a few years ago.
    Nin Situ: Who they are, what they want, we still haven't found out.;<< Play (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_側站抬手返回) >>
    Nin Situ: The only thing we know is that they have been making genetically engineered babies for decades.
    Nin Situ: You are one of their products.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->How many more are there? I mean, people like me.
        Nin Situ: That is classified.
    ->When did you realize I'm one of them?
        Nin Situ: Is that relevant?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->I'm curious.
        ->Can't I just ask?
            Nin Situ: ...
            Nin Situ: All I can say is that I knew before today.
            Thought: That means she's been watching me for a while...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Nin Situ: That is all I can tell you.
    Nin Situ: Are you satisfied with the answer?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Why would they do that?
        Nin Situ: That is classified.
    ->Satisfied? What do you think?
        Nin Situ: Judging by the sarcastic question, I suppose not.
        Thought: She sighed.
        Nin Situ: Listen...
    ->I won't push, if that's all you're authorized to share.
        Nin Situ: Thank you for understanding.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Nin Situ: I know you're undergoing one shock after another.
    Nin Situ: But this is the reality. Accept it, or...
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Or what?
        Nin Situ: Or you will fall into a downward spiral, seeing conspiracies everywhere, doubting everything.
    ->I get the idea.
        Nin Situ: ...
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Nin Situ: Good night.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Good night.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Good night.
    Nin Situ: Good night.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<Set($DLState,司徒可以開始離開主角家)>>
Thought: So, what happens now...?
Thought: She's not joking. But I...
//司徒離開，走到一半停下來。
<<#End>>

body: //嚴勝和走過來低頭 Shane Yan: Shooting a gun in the company... Shane Yan: Are you nuts? ?Camleon Bai: Relax. This room is soundproofed. ?Camleon Bai: Plus, you asked me to "fix her", no? Shane Yan: Use your reptile brain. I said fix, not public execution. ?Camleon Bai: Just you and me here. I wouldn't call it public? Shane Yan: Enough!!!;<< Play (嚴勝和, MBU_嚴勝和_黑影_激動) >> Shane Yan: Don't push my patience. You promised to be discreet. Shane Yan: Now, you tell me. Shane Yan: Which part of that was discreet!? ?Camleon Bai: Uh-huh...;<> ?Camleon Bai: Correct me if I'm wrong. ?Camleon Bai: The reason why I'm here is that you need me. ?Camleon Bai: You need me to fix problematic people popping up here and there. Shane Yan: ... Shane Yan: That is right. Shane Yan: But don't forget, you can be one of those "problematic people", too. ?Camleon Bai: ...Will do. <<#End>>
